query: long exposure light trails night abstract streaks
message: sub:intentional_blur/light_trails — anti_aesthetic — long exposure streaks, chaotic light painting, ICM at night

response.objective_caption: Curved streaks of bright orange-red light arc across a dark field, varying in length and trajectory, with some trails fading into faint red glow while others remain vivid and sharp-edged.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Curved streaks of bright orange-red light arc across a dark field through intentional motion blur, their glowing trails bleeding into soft halos and faint red atmospheric haze, creating an abstract composition where light itself becomes the unrecognizable subject through dreamlike, unanchored movement.
